# Obligatory Java Current Version Update

Use this skill when modernizing Java code/config.

## Required checks

1. `pom.xml` uses a single current Java version property (`java.version`) and compiler source/target/release align to it.
2. Java code uses language features compatible with that configured version.
3. Build plugins are compatible with selected Java version.
4. Update docs/comments that reference Java version.

## Verification

- Run Maven build/tests after update.
- Confirm no feature/version mismatch warnings/errors.
